Personalized Plans
Workout Complete!
How It Works

Three Steps to Your Plan

01

Set Your Goals

Choose your fitness goal — build muscle, lose fat, or improve endurance. Tell us your experience level and available equipment. Our AI uses this to build a plan that fits your life.

02

Choose Equipment

Select what you have — full gym, dumbbells only, or just bodyweight.

03

Get Your Plan

AI generates your personalized workout in 10 seconds. Start training immediately.

Features

Free Fitness Tools & AI Workout Features

From AI-generated workout plans to free fitness calculators, GetFitAI provides everything you need for your fitness journey. Personalized training plans, BMI calculator, TDEE calculator, body fat calculator, and more.

AI Workout Plans

Stop guessing which exercises to do. Our AI generates scientifically personalized training plans based on your fitness goals, experience level, and available equipment. Every workout plan is tailored specifically to you.

Free Fitness Calculators

Accurately calculate BMI, TDEE, body fat percentage, and one-rep max without complex formulas. Get data-driven support for your training and diet decisions with our free fitness calculator suite.

Personalized Insights

Every body is unique. Our AI analyzes your data to provide personalized fitness recommendations and workout plans that truly work for your specific body type, schedule, and training history.

Equipment Adaptation

Whether you have a full commercial gym, only dumbbells at home, or just your bodyweight, GetFitAI creates efficient workout plans tailored to your exact equipment situation. No excuses.

Time Optimization

15 minutes or 90 minutes? Our AI optimizes every minute of your workout based on your schedule. Get maximum results in minimum time with personalized training plans that fit your life.

Progressive Training

All workout plans follow progressive overload principles to ensure continuous improvement while avoiding injury and plateaus. Your personalized plan grows with you as you get stronger.

Free Fitness Tools

15 Free Fitness Calculators & Workout Tools

All fitness calculators use validated formulas. Free BMI calculator, calorie calculator, body fat calculator, protein calculator, and more. No signup, no ads, instant results.

BMI Calculator

Check if your weight is in a healthy range instantly.

Calorie Calculator

Calculate your daily calorie needs based on activity.

Body Fat Calculator

Estimate body fat percentage with validated formulas.

1RM Calculator

Predict your max strength for any exercise.

Heart Rate Calculator

Find your target heart rate zones for training.

Protein Calculator

Get your optimal daily protein intake.

Why GetFitAI

The Smarter Way to Get Fit

100% Free

No hidden fees, no credit card required. All features including the AI workout plan generator and personalized fitness calculators are completely free to use. Generate unlimited workout plans at zero cost.

No Signup Required

Start using GetFitAI immediately. No account creation, no email verification, no data collection. Just open the site and get your free personalized training plan in under 60 seconds.

AI-Powered Personalization

Advanced AI algorithms create personalized training plans based on your specific goals, fitness level, and equipment. Unlike generic workout plans, GetFitAI adapts to your body and schedule.

Science-Based Training

All workout plans follow established exercise science principles including progressive overload, periodization, and optimal recovery. Train smarter, not just harder, with evidence-based fitness programming.

Trusted by Users Worldwide

Join over 10,000 users who have already achieved their fitness goals with GetFitAI. From beginners to advanced athletes, our AI workout plans deliver real results for every fitness level.
